verdict: Moderate risk of AI displacement, with some tasks being highly automatable but others requiring human judgment and physical dexterity.

reasoning_steps.title: High routine cognitive tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks like assembling pipe sections, installing underground piping systems, and selecting pipe sizes are highly automatable with current LLMs.

reasoning_steps.title: AI capability gap
reasoning_steps.body: The AI capability gap is high due to the complexity of plumbing tasks, which require human judgment and physical dexterity.

adjacent_careers.name: Pipefitter
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Pipefitters install, maintain, and repair pipes in a variety of settings. While some tasks overlap, pipefitters require more physical dexterity and hands-on skills.

adjacent_careers.name: Steamfitter
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Steamfitters install, maintain, and repair steam-heating systems. Some tasks overlap, but steamfitters require more specialized knowledge and physical dexterity.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered pipe inspection tool
recent_developments.impact: This tool uses computer vision and machine learning to inspect pipes for defects and leaks, reducing the need for human inspectors.

recent_developments.headline: Hands-on trades remain among the least automated
recent_developments.impact: Physical, in-situ work captures very little AI use today; trades have the lowest exposure of any major occupation group.

quotes.quote: We do not have enough plumbers, electricians, or HVAC techs. AI cannot fix a leaking pipe. The shortage in the trades is only going to widen.
quotes.speaker: Mike Rowe
quotes.title: Host of Dirty Jobs; founder, mikeroweWORKS Foundation

quotes.quote: The tasks most exposed to large language models are not physical. Plumbers, electricians, and construction workers have the lowest exposure of any major occupation group.
quotes.speaker: Tyna Eloundou and Pamela Mishkin
quotes.title: Researchers, OpenAI
quotes.source: GPTs are GPTs: An Early Look at the Labor Market Impact Potential of LLMs

quotes.quote: The world is short on skilled tradespeople and we have spent two generations telling kids the only path is a four-year degree. AI is now coming for the desk jobs first.
quotes.speaker: Mark Cuban
quotes.title: Investor; co-founder, Cost Plus Drugs
